name: The Dice Within the Machine — K.516f Prototype
description: Reference implementation of the R-C-M-R framework ⟨Σ, P, Φ, γ⟩ applied to Mozart's Musikalisches Würfelspiel K.516f (1792). Pure-Python generator with Fortepiano-modelled additive synthesis (inharmonic partials, two-stage envelope, hammer-noise transient, soundboard formant, stereo image). Monte-Carlo cross-check reproduces the 46.842-bit specification entropy reported in the accompanying manuscript.
